news.title: OpenAI Releases GPT-4.5 with Enhanced Reasoning
news.titleZh: OpenAI 发布 GPT-4.5，推理能力大幅提升
news.summary: OpenAI announces GPT-4.5, featuring significant improvements in mathematical reasoning and code generation.
news.summaryZh: OpenAI 发布 GPT-4.5，在数学推理和代码生成方面有显著提升。
news.content:
OpenAI has officially released GPT-4.5, the latest iteration in their flagship language model series. This version introduces several key improvements:

1. Enhanced Mathematical Reasoning: GPT-4.5 demonstrates superior performance on advanced mathematics problems, including calculus and abstract algebra.

2. Code Generation: The model now generates more efficient and bug-free code, with particular strength in Python and JavaScript.

3. Context Understanding: Improved ability to maintain context over longer conversations, with support for up to 128k tokens.

4. Multilingual Support: Better performance across non-English languages, particularly Chinese, Japanese, and German.

The model is available through OpenAI's API and ChatGPT Plus subscription.

news.title: Google DeepMind's AlphaFold 3 Predicts All Biomolecules
news.titleZh: Google DeepMind AlphaFold 3 可预测所有生物分子
news.summary: AlphaFold 3 expands beyond proteins to predict DNA, RNA, and small molecule structures with unprecedented accuracy.
news.summaryZh: AlphaFold 3 超越蛋白质预测，可以高精度预测 DNA、RNA 和小分子结构。
news.content:
Google DeepMind has released AlphaFold 3, a groundbreaking expansion of their protein structure prediction system. The new version can predict the structure of virtually all biomolecules:

Key Capabilities:
- Protein-DNA interactions
- RNA folding patterns
- Small molecule binding sites
- Complex molecular assemblies

Impact on Drug Discovery:
Pharmaceutical companies are already using AlphaFold 3 to identify new drug targets and predict drug-protein interactions, potentially reducing drug development time by years.

news.title: Tesla Unveils FSD V13 with End-to-End Neural Networks
news.titleZh: 特斯拉发布 FSD V13，采用端到端神经网络
news.summary: Tesla's Full Self-Driving V13 replaces traditional computer vision with a single end-to-end neural network.
news.summaryZh: 特斯拉 FSD V13 用单一端到端神经网络取代传统计算机视觉。
news.content:
Tesla has released Full Self-Driving (FSD) Version 13, marking a major architectural shift in autonomous driving technology.

Key Changes:
- Single end-to-end neural network replaces 300,000 lines of C++ code
- Direct video input to steering output
- 60% reduction in human interventions
- Improved handling of complex urban scenarios

The update is rolling out to FSD Beta users in North America this week.

news.title: Boston Dynamics' Atlas Can Now Do Construction Work
news.titleZh: 波士顿动力 Atlas 机器人现已能从事建筑工作
news.summary: The latest Atlas demonstration shows the humanoid robot performing construction tasks including drywall installation.
news.summaryZh: 最新的 Atlas 演示显示，这款人形机器人可以执行建筑任务。
news.content:
Boston Dynamics has showcased a new version of their Atlas humanoid robot capable of performing construction tasks autonomously.

Demonstrated Capabilities:
- Drywall installation
- Tool manipulation (drills, hammers)
- Material transport
- Working alongside human construction workers

Commercial Deployment:
Boston Dynamics plans to begin pilot programs with construction companies in Q3 2026.

news.title: OpenClaw 2.0 Released with Multi-Agent Orchestration
news.titleZh: OpenClaw 2.0 发布，支持多智能体编排
news.summary: OpenClaw 2.0 introduces agent teams, shared memory, and a skill marketplace.
news.summaryZh: OpenClaw 2.0 引入智能体团队、共享内存和技能市场。
news.content:
OpenClaw 2.0 is now available, bringing powerful new capabilities for building AI agent applications:

New Features:
- Agent Teams: Coordinate multiple agents to work on complex tasks
- Shared Memory: Agents can share context and learn from each other
- Skill Marketplace: Discover and install pre-built agent skills
- Enhanced Security: Enterprise-grade access controls

The update is available immediately for all users.

news.title: Sora Public Release: OpenAI's Video Generation Model
news.titleZh: Sora 公开发布：OpenAI 视频生成模型
news.summary: Sora is now available to ChatGPT Plus and Pro users, capable of generating 60-second 1080p videos.
news.summaryZh: Sora 现已向 ChatGPT Plus 和 Pro 用户开放，可根据文本提示生成60秒1080p视频。
news.content:
OpenAI has officially released Sora, their text-to-video generation model, to the public.

Capabilities:
- Generate 60-second 1080p videos
- Text-to-video and image-to-video
- Video editing and extension
- Support for various aspect ratios

Availability:
Sora is included with ChatGPT Plus ($20/month) and Pro subscriptions. Free tier users get limited generations.

news.title: Mistral AI Releases Large 2.5 with 128K Context
news.titleZh: Mistral AI 发布 Large 2.5，支持 128K 上下文
news.summary: Mistral Large 2.5 offers competitive performance with GPT-4 at a fraction of the cost.
news.summaryZh: Mistral Large 2.5 以更低成本提供与 GPT-4 相当的性能。
news.content:
Mistral AI has announced Large 2.5, their most capable language model to date.

Key Features:
- 128K context window
- Multilingual support (80+ languages)
- Coding and reasoning capabilities
- 50% lower cost than GPT-4 Turbo

The model is available through Mistral's API and on Azure AI Studio.

news.title: Figure AI's Humanoid Robot Joins BMW Factory
news.titleZh: Figure AI 人形机器人加入宝马工厂
news.summary: Figure 01 humanoid robots begin trial deployment at BMW's Spartanburg plant.
news.summaryZh: Figure 01 人形机器人在宝马斯巴达堡工厂开始试部署。
news.content:
Figure AI has begun deploying their humanoid robots at BMW's manufacturing facility in Spartanburg, South Carolina.

Deployment Details:
- Initial trial with 10 Figure 01 robots
- Tasks include parts handling and quality inspection
- 24/7 operation capability
- Integration with existing factory systems

If successful, BMW plans to expand deployment to additional facilities.

news.title: Waymo Expands Robotaxi Service to Los Angeles
news.titleZh: Waymo 将机器人出租车服务扩展至洛杉矶
news.summary: Waymo's autonomous robotaxi service is now available to the public in Los Angeles.
news.summaryZh: Waymo 的自动驾驶机器人出租车服务现已在洛杉矶向公众开放。
news.content:
Waymo has expanded its robotaxi service to Los Angeles, making it the third city to offer public autonomous rides.

Service Area:
- 63 square miles covering Santa Monica, Century City, and downtown LA
- 24/7 availability
- No safety driver in most conditions

Pricing:
Rides are priced competitively with Uber and Lyft, starting at $3.50 base fare plus $1.50 per mile.

news.title: Claude 3.5 Sonnet Achieves SOTA on Coding Benchmarks
news.titleZh: Claude 3.5 Sonnet 在编程基准测试中达到 SOTA
news.summary: Anthropic's Claude 3.5 Sonnet sets new records on HumanEval and other coding benchmarks.
news.summaryZh: Anthropic 的 Claude 3.5 Sonnet 在 HumanEval 等编程基准测试中创造新纪录。
news.content:
Anthropic has released Claude 3.5 Sonnet, setting new state-of-the-art results on coding evaluation benchmarks.

Benchmark Results:
- HumanEval: 92.0% (previous SOTA: 90.2%)
- MBPP: 88.5%
- SWE-bench: 56.7%

The model is available through Anthropic's API and Claude.ai with existing subscription plans.

news.title: Hugging Face Launches ZeroGPU for Free AI Inference
news.titleZh: Hugging Face 推出 ZeroGPU 免费 AI 推理服务
news.summary: ZeroGPU provides free GPU access for running open-source AI models.
news.summaryZh: ZeroGPU 提供免费 GPU 访问来运行开源 AI 模型。
news.content:
Hugging Face has launched ZeroGPU, a new service providing free GPU access for AI model inference.

Features:
- Free access to NVIDIA A100 GPUs
- Support for 100,000+ open-source models
- No credit card required
- Rate limits: 1000 requests/day for free tier

This initiative aims to make AI development accessible to researchers and developers worldwide.

news.title: Midjourney V7 Introduces Real-Time Video Generation
news.titleZh: Midjourney V7 引入实时视频生成
news.summary: Midjourney V7 adds video generation capabilities, allowing users to create 4-second clips.
news.summaryZh: Midjourney V7 增加视频生成功能，允许用户实时从图像创建4秒视频片段。
news.content:
Midjourney has released Version 7, adding video generation to their popular AI image creation platform.

Video Features:
- 4-second 1080p video clips
- Image-to-video conversion
- Motion brush for controlling movement
- Camera control (pan, zoom, rotate)

Pricing:
Video generation is included with Pro plans ($60/month) and above. Standard plan users can purchase video credits.
